# Exode SDK - full context for AI assistants

Self-contained reference for the `@exode-team/sdk` package. Feed it to an LLM so the model
can write correct integration code for the Exode platform without extra context.

Package version: **0.1.1**
Repository: https://github.com/exode-team/exode-sdk
npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@exode-team/sdk

---

## 1. Package overview

Official SDK for Exode (EdTech SaaS for online schools). Three independent subpath modules:

| Import | Purpose | Runtime |
|--------|---------|---------|
| `@exode-team/sdk/api` | Server-side REST client `ExodeAPI` for `/saas/v2/*` | Node.js >= 18 |
| `@exode-team/sdk/miniapp` | Client-side bridge for iframe mini apps | Browser |
| `@exode-team/sdk/miniapp/react` | React hooks on top of the bridge | Browser + React >= 17 |

Requirements: Node.js >= 18; TypeScript >= 5.7 (optional, types ship with package);
React >= 17 (optional peer dep, only for `miniapp/react`). Dependency: `zod@^4`.

Install: `npm install @exode-team/sdk`. CDN (miniapp IIFE):
`https://cdn.exode.biz/sdk/v0.1.1/miniapp.global.js` (global `ExodeMiniAppSDK`).

No root export — always import from a specific subpath.

---

## 2. API Client (`@exode-team/sdk/api`)

Server-side HTTP client for `/saas/v2/*` (server-only; never ship the token to the browser).
Backend wraps every success response as `{ success, code, payload }` — the client unwraps `payload`
automatically. All `/saas/v2/*` endpoints are mirrored 1:1 by the SDK.

### 2.1 Constructor

```ts
import { ExodeAPI, ExodeAPIError } from '@exode-team/sdk/api'

interface ExodeAPIConfig {
  sellerId: number       // required -> header Seller-Id
  schoolId: number       // required -> header School-Id
  token: string          // required -> Authorization: Bearer <token>
  baseUrl?: string       // default 'https://api.exode.biz/saas/v2'
  timeout?: number       // ms, default 30000
  validate?: boolean     // default false; if true, every response is safeParse'd against its zod schema
}

const exodeApi = new ExodeAPI({ sellerId: 1, schoolId: 1, token: process.env.EXODE_TOKEN! })
```

Constructor throws if `token`, `sellerId` or `schoolId` is missing.

### 2.2 Low-level request

```ts
exodeApi.request<S extends z.ZodType>(method: string, path: string, options: {
  schema: S                          // zod schema for the payload (used for typing + optional validation)
  body?: unknown
  query?: Record<string, unknown>    // arrays -> repeated keys; objects -> bracket keys; Date -> ISO
  validate?: boolean                 // per-request override of the client-level flag
}): Promise<z.infer<S>>
```

### 2.3 `school.user`

```ts
import { UserStateKey } from '@exode-team/sdk/api'

// create/update/find return the user object directly (or null)
exodeApi.school.user.create(input: UserCreateInput): Promise<User | null>
exodeApi.school.user.update(userId: number, input: UpdateUserInput): Promise<User | null>
exodeApi.school.user.upsert(input: UpdateUserInput): Promise<{ user: User; isCreated: boolean }>
exodeApi.school.user.find(input: { login?: string; tgId?: number; extId?: string }): Promise<User | null>
exodeApi.school.user.deleteMany(userIds: number[], reason: string): Promise<{ deleted: number[]; skipped: number[] }>
exodeApi.school.user.getState(userId: number, key: UserStateKey): Promise<unknown>
exodeApi.school.user.setState(userId: number, key: UserStateKey, value: unknown): Promise<boolean>
exodeApi.school.user.createAuthToken(input: { userId: number; forceCreate?: boolean }):
  Promise<{ session: Session; isCreated: boolean }>

interface UserCreateInput {
  email?: string | null; phone?: string | null; tgId?: number | null
  extId?: string | null; banned?: boolean | null
  profile?: {
    firstName?: string | null; lastName?: string | null
    bdate?: string | null                         // 'YYYY-MM-DD'
    sex?: 'Ufo' | 'Women' | 'Men' | null
    role?: 'Student' | 'Tutor' | 'Parent' | null
    contact?: { phone?: string | null; email?: string | null; messengerUrl?: string | null }
  }
}
// UpdateUserInput = partial of the above (same shape, all optional).
```

`UserStateKey` writable keys: `UtmSignupParams`, `PersonalInfoFilled`, `OnBoardingProgress`, `ContentCategoryIds`
(readable also includes `VkToken`, returned masked). Use `session.token` as `?___uat=<token>` on a school URL
for auto-login (canonical external sign-in, incl. Telegram Mini Apps).

### 2.4 `school.group`

```ts
exodeApi.school.group.list(params?: FilterGroupInput & ListInput): Promise<PaginatedList<GroupSaasItem>>
exodeApi.school.group.addMembers(groupId: number, userIds: number[]):   // max 250
  Promise<{ exist: GroupMember[]; created: GroupMember[] }>
exodeApi.school.group.removeMembers(groupId: number, userIds: number[]): Promise<{ affected: number }>  // max 250
// GroupSaasItem: { groupId, name, courseId?, courseName? }
```

### 2.5 `school.course`

```ts
exodeApi.school.course.list(params?: FilterCourseInput & ListInput): Promise<PaginatedList<CourseSaasItem>>
exodeApi.school.course.progresses(courseId: number, params?: ListInput): Promise<PaginatedList<CourseProgress>>
// CourseSaasItem: { courseId, name, type, groupIds[] }
```

### 2.6 `school.invoice` and `school.productAccess`

```ts
exodeApi.school.invoice.list(params?: FilterInvoiceInput & ListInput): Promise<PaginatedList<InvoiceSaasItem>>
exodeApi.school.productAccess.list(params?: FilterAccessProductInput & ListInput):
  Promise<PaginatedList<ProductAccessSaasItem>>
```

### 2.7 `school.form`

```ts
exodeApi.school.form.layoutCreate(input: CreateFormLayoutInput): Promise<FormLayout>
exodeApi.school.form.layoutUpdate(layoutId: number, input: UpdateFormLayoutInput): Promise<FormLayout>
exodeApi.school.form.layoutDelete(layoutId: number): Promise<{ affected: number }>
exodeApi.school.form.customFieldValueGet(params?: FilterFormFieldValueInput & ListInput & { sort?: BaseSortInput }):
  Promise<PaginatedList<FormFieldValue>>
exodeApi.school.form.customFieldValueSet(input: {
  userId: number; layoutId: number; values: { fieldId: number; text?; number?; boolean?; date?; json? }[]
}): Promise<FormFieldValue[]>
exodeApi.school.form.customFieldValueSetBySlug(input: {
  userId: number; layoutId: number; values: { slug: string; value: unknown | null }[]
}): Promise<FormFieldValue[]>
// CreateFormLayoutInput: { mode: 'Form'|'Signup'|'Custom'|'Welcome'|'Participant', name, internalName,
//   status?: 'Draft'|'Published', slug?, note?, productIds?, config?: { resubmitMode? } }
```

### 2.8 `school.queryExport`

Async exports: `generate` returns a uuid; poll `getResult` until `status` is `Completed`/`Failed`.

```ts
import { QueryExportType, QueryExportFormat } from '@exode-team/sdk/api'

const { uuid } = await exodeApi.school.queryExport.generate({
  type: QueryExportType.GroupMemberFindMany,
  format: QueryExportFormat.Csv,                 // optional, default Xlsx
  variables: { filter: { groupIds: [42] } },     // free-form { filter, sort? }
})  // -> { uuid, flow, status, isCompleted, userId?, createdAt, updatedAt? }   (rate limit: 100/hour)

const result = await exodeApi.school.queryExport.getResult(uuid)
// -> { total, completed, status, result? } | null ; result = { fileUrl, fileName, fileSize }
```

```ts
enum QueryExportType {
  SchoolUserFindMany                  = 'QUERY_EXPORT_TYPE_SCHOOL_USER_FIND_MANY',
  GroupMemberFindMany                 = 'QUERY_EXPORT_TYPE_GROUP_MEMBER_FIND_MANY',
  InvoiceManageFindMany               = 'QUERY_EXPORT_TYPE_INVOICE_MANAGE_FIND_MANY',
  SchoolStudentFindMany               = 'QUERY_EXPORT_TYPE_SCHOOL_STUDENT_FIND_MANY',
  ProductBillingAccessFindMany        = 'QUERY_EXPORT_TYPE_PRODUCT_BILLING_ACCESS_FIND_MANY',
  CourseLessonPracticeAttemptFindMany = 'QUERY_EXPORT_TYPE_COURSE_LESSON_PRACTICE_ATTEMPT_FIND_MANY',
}
enum QueryExportFormat { Csv = 'EXPORT_FORMAT_CSV', Xlsx = 'EXPORT_FORMAT_XLSX', Json = 'EXPORT_FORMAT_JSON' }
enum WorkflowExecutionStatus { Waiting='Waiting', Processing='Processing', Failed='Failed', Canceled='Canceled', Completed='Completed' }
```

### 2.9 Pagination

List methods accept `take` (1–1000, default 100), `page` (>=1), `skip` (>=0). They return:

```ts
interface PaginatedList<T> {
  items: T[]; page: number; count: number; pages: number
  isFirst: boolean; isLast: boolean
  next: { skip: number; take: number; page: number }
  prev: { skip: number; take: number; page: number }
}
```

Array filters serialize as repeated query keys (`userIds=1&userIds=2`); ranges as `{ from, to }` objects;
`Date` values as ISO strings.

### 2.10 Entity types (z.infer from shared zod schemas)

Types are inferred from the backend public zod schemas. Common audit fields on most entities:
`id, createdAt, updatedAt, deletedAt?, archivedAt?`. Dates are ISO strings; money fields are numbers.

```ts
// User (= userWithProfile)
interface User {
  id: number; uuid: string; domain: string
  email: string | null; phone: string | null; tgId: number | null; vkId: number | null
  appleId: string | null; extId: string | null; schoolId: number | null
  active: boolean; activated: boolean; banned: boolean; alive: boolean | null
  language: 'Ru'|'Uz'|'En'|'Qa' | null; timezone: number | null; lastOnlineAt: string | null
  createdOnDomain: 'Ru'|'Uz'|'Kz'|'Biz'|'Global'; product: 'BizSchool'|'Marketplace'
  starsBalance: number; permissions: string[]
  createdAt: string; updatedAt: string; deletedAt: string | null; archivedAt: string | null
  profile?: {
    id: number; userId: number | null; official: boolean
    firstName: string | null; lastName: string | null; fullName: string | null
    avatar: object; bdate: string | null; sex: 'Ufo'|'Women'|'Men'
    role: 'Student'|'Tutor'|'Parent'; country: string | null; city: string | null
    title: string | null; emojiTitle: string | null; titleState: object
  } | null
}

interface Session {
  id: number; uuid: string; userId: number | null; deviceUuid: string; token: string
  alive: boolean; isOnline: boolean; launcher: string
  appLocation: string | null; appLocationParams: object; appVersion: string | null
  language: string | null; timezone: number | null; lastActivityAt: string | null; expireAt: string | null
}
```

Other returned entity shapes (`GroupMember`, `CourseProgress`, `FormLayout`, `FormFieldValue`, invoice/product
items, etc.) match the REST docs at https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/objects/entities/index.

### 2.11 Exports

```ts
// client
export { ExodeAPI, ExodeAPIError }
export type { ExodeAPIConfig, RequestOptions }
// input types (from shared codegen): ListInput, BaseSortInput, DateRangeInput, NumberRangeInput,
//   UtmParamsInput, ProfileContactInput, UpdateProfileInput, UpdateUserInput, FilterGroupInput,
//   FilterCourseInput, FilterProgressCourseInput, FilterInvoiceInput, FilterAccessProductInput,
//   FilterFormFieldValueInput, CreateFormLayoutInput, UpdateFormLayoutInput, FormLayoutConfigInput,
//   UpsertFormFieldValueInput
// SDK-only input types: CreateProfileInput, UserCreateInput, UserFindInput, AuthTokenInput,
//   GroupListParams, CourseListParams, FormFieldValueGetParams, SetCustomFieldValueInput,
//   UpsertFormFieldValueBySlugInput, SetCustomFieldValueBySlugInput, InvoiceListParams,
//   ProductAccessListParams, QueryExportGenerateInput
// zod schemas (for opt-in validation): userPublicSchema, profilePublicSchema, userWithProfileSchema,
//   sessionPublicSchema, groupPublicSchema, groupMemberPublicSchema, courseProgressPublicSchema,
//   formLayoutPublicSchema, formFieldValuePublicSchema, *OutputSchema, paginatedListSchema, affectedOutputSchema
// enums: Language, ProfileRole, UserSexType, UserStateKey, AppServeDomain, AppServeProduct, CourseType,
//   CourseParticipationType, CourseProgressLessonStatus, CourseProgressScheduleStatus, InvoiceType,
//   InvoiceStatus, ProductCurrency, ProductBillingType, ProductAccessBillingStatus,
//   ProductPriceBillingInterval, ProductParticipantStatus, FormLayoutMode, FormLayoutStatus,
//   FormResubmitMode, GroupSpace, GroupTgConnectionMode, WorkflowExecutionStatus, WorkflowExecutionFlow,
//   SortDirection, QueryExportType, QueryExportFormat
```

### 2.12 Error handling

```ts
class ExodeAPIError extends Error {
  readonly code: number          // HTTP status, or 0 (NetworkError) / 408 (Timeout)
  readonly errorCause: string    // 'EmailIsBusy', 'Unauthorized', 'Rate', 'Timeout', 'NetworkError',
                                  // 'ParseError', 'ValidationError'
  readonly details?: string
}
// API error body: { success: false, code, cause, message, error? }
```

### 2.13 Typical scenario: auto-login a student

```ts
const { user } = await exodeApi.school.user.upsert({ tgId: 123456789, profile: { firstName: 'Ivan', role: 'Student' } })
const { session } = await exodeApi.school.user.createAuthToken({ userId: user.id })
const url = `https://my-school.exode.biz?___uat=${session.token}`
```

---

## 3. MiniApp bridge (`@exode-team/sdk/miniapp`)

Client SDK for apps embedded in an iframe inside the Exode host app. Two-way `postMessage` communication.

### 3.1 Constructor & handshake

```ts
import { ExodeMiniApp } from '@exode-team/sdk/miniapp'

interface ExodeMiniAppConfig {
  appId: string              // required; validated by the host during handshake
  targetOrigin?: string      // default '*'; in production pin the exact Exode origin
  timeout?: number           // ms, default 10000
}

const app = new ExodeMiniApp({ appId: 'my-app' })
const ctx: MiniAppContext = await app.init()   // must run inside an iframe; calling init() twice throws
```

### 3.2 Commands (MiniApp -> Host)

```ts
await app.route.navigate(path: string, params?: Record<string, string>)
await app.route.back()
await app.ui.showSnackbar({ message: string, type?: 'success' | 'error' | 'info' })
await app.ui.setTabbarVisible(visible: boolean)
await app.ui.setHeaderVisible(visible: boolean)
await app.ui.close()
// throw 'ExodeMiniApp is not initialized' if called before init()
```

### 3.3 Events (Host -> MiniApp)

```ts
const off = app.on('theme:changed', (theme) => { document.body.className = theme.scheme })
off()  // unsubscribe
app.getContext()  // MiniAppContext | null
app.destroy()
```

| Event | Payload |
|-------|---------|
| `theme:changed` | `MiniAppTheme` |
| `user:updated` | `MiniAppUser` |
| `school:updated` | `Record<string, unknown>` |
| `config:updated` | `MiniAppConfig` |
| `route:changed` | `{ path: string; params: Record<string, string> }` |
| `context:updated` | `Partial<MiniAppContext>` (auto-merged into cache) |
| `visibility:changed` | `{ visible: boolean }` |

### 3.4 Types

```ts
type Platform = 'web' | 'native'
interface MiniAppContext { user: MiniAppUser; school: Record<string, unknown>; theme: MiniAppTheme; platform: Platform; config: MiniAppConfig }
interface MiniAppUser { id: number; uuid: string | null; firstName: string | null; lastName: string | null
  avatar: { id: number; small: string | null; medium: string | null; maximum: string | null } | null
  email: string | null; phone: string | null; role: string; language: string | null }
interface MiniAppTheme { scheme: 'light' | 'dark' }
interface MiniAppConfig { isDesktop: boolean; isMobile: boolean; language: string }
```

---

## 4. React hooks (`@exode-team/sdk/miniapp/react`)

```tsx
import { ExodeMiniAppProvider } from '@exode-team/sdk/miniapp/react'

// config extends ExodeMiniAppConfig + renderMode?: 'defer' | 'immediate' (default 'defer')
// 'defer'     -> children mount after handshake
// 'immediate' -> children mount on first render (SSR-safe); hooks return defaults until ready
<ExodeMiniAppProvider config={{ appId: 'my-app' }}>
  <App />
</ExodeMiniAppProvider>
```

```ts
useExodeApp():        { app: ExodeMiniApp | null; isReady: boolean; error: Error | null }
useExodeUser():       { user: MiniAppUser | null; isLoggedIn: boolean }
useExodeTheme():      { scheme: 'light' | 'dark'; isDark: boolean }
useExodeSchool():     { school: Record<string, unknown> | null }
useExodeConfig():     { isDesktop: boolean; isMobile: boolean; language: string; platform: Platform }
useExodeNavigation(): { navigate: (path, params?) => Promise<void>; back: () => Promise<void> }
useExodeUI():         { showSnackbar; setTabbarVisible; setHeaderVisible; close }
```

All hooks must be used inside `<ExodeMiniAppProvider>`. `user` is `null` until handshake — guard with `isLoggedIn`.

---

## 5. Cheat sheet

| Task | Import | Example |
|------|--------|---------|
| Create a user from your server | `@exode-team/sdk/api` | `exodeApi.school.user.create({ ... })` |
| Auto-login a user into a school | `@exode-team/sdk/api` | `createAuthToken` -> `?___uat=<token>` |
| List courses / progress | `@exode-team/sdk/api` | `school.course.list()` / `school.course.progresses(id)` |
| List invoices / accesses | `@exode-team/sdk/api` | `school.invoice.list()` / `school.productAccess.list()` |
| Manage form values | `@exode-team/sdk/api` | `school.form.customFieldValueSetBySlug({ ... })` |
| Export data | `@exode-team/sdk/api` | `queryExport.generate` + `getResult` |
| Widget embedded in Exode | `@exode-team/sdk/miniapp` | `new ExodeMiniApp({ appId })` |
| Same, with React | `@exode-team/sdk/miniapp/react` | `<ExodeMiniAppProvider>` + hooks |

## 6. Pitfalls

- Do not import `@exode-team/sdk/api` in browser code — the token will leak.
- `create`/`update`/`find` return the user object directly (or `null`); `upsert` returns `{ user, isCreated }`.
- `queryExport.generate` takes `{ type, variables, format? }` — filters go inside `variables` (e.g. `{ filter: {...} }`).
- `QueryExportType` / `QueryExportFormat` are prefixed enums — do not pass raw strings without the prefix.
- `ExodeMiniApp.init()` only works inside an iframe and only once.
- `targetOrigin: '*'` is for local dev only; pin the exact origin in production.
- Required REST headers (`Seller-Id`, `School-Id`, `Authorization: Bearer <token>`) are set by `ExodeAPI` automatically.

## 7. Links

- Docs: https://docs.exode.biz
- REST API: https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/setup
- Objects/entities: https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/objects/entities/index
- Support: https://t.me/exode_support_biz
